title: Lack of Audit Logging
description: Insufficient logging of user actions and system events makes it difficult to track down the source of security incidents, investigate breaches, or determine accountability. The absence of documented audit procedures exacerbates this risk.
attack_vector: An attacker can perform malicious actions without leaving a traceable record, making it difficult to identify and prosecute them.
mitigations: Implement comprehensive logging of all user actions, system events, and API calls.
Securely store logs and regularly review them for suspicious activity.
Establish clear audit procedures and assign responsibility for log analysis.
